title: oreogrammitis loheriana
intro: Oreogrammitis loheriana, also known as the Loher's fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Oreogrammitis loheriana include its potential to alleviate pain, reduce fever, and treat various infections, making it a valuable natural remedy in some cultures. In herbal preparations, Oreogrammitis loheriana is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
